_comment: Cyborgs guild layer for 3s. Like Necromancers, this guild has NO private MIP tag - vitals ride the mud-wide FFF composite feed (A=hp C=sp E=gp1 G=gp2). Maxes self-calibrate from peak observed value. Cascade rule REPLACE (character file wins).
Pool labels: HP/SP verified from score; Power, GP2 still GUESSED (value didn't echo to a named gscore line) - rename live.
Attack: requires an explicit target ('kill <mob>'); plain 'kill' won't work. autoattack_command left empty so Hunt parses the room and sends 'kill <keyword>'.

Cyborgs DO NOT use SP (no SP bar): score 'Sps' reads garbage/overmax and the FFF feed never sends the C slot. (Overmax HP/SP generally is normal here - breaking a bound item at the gypsy dumps a chunk that can exceed max.)
